mapper.select: select OBJECTID as objectId,OBJECTNAME as objectName,OBJECTMEMO as objectMemo,OBJECTSTATE as objectState, TABLEID as tableId,TABLENAME AS tableName,DATATYPE as dataType,STORETYPE as storeType,DBSOURCE AS dbsource, DATA_SOURCE as dataSource,sourceid as sourceId,ISACTIVETABLE as isActiveTable, (case when UPDATETIME is null then '' else to_char(UPDATETIME,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') end ) as updateTime, UPDATER as updater,VERSION as version,SECRETLEVEL as dataLevel from synlte.object_history where objectId = #{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and updateTime = #{updateTime}

select OBJECTID AS objectId, RECNO AS recno,FIELDID AS fieldId,FIELDNAME AS fieldName,FIELDCHINEENAME AS fieldChineeName, FIELDDESCRIBE AS fieldDescribe,FIELDTYPE AS fieldType,FIELDLEN AS fieldLen,DEFAULTVALUE AS defaultValue,INDEXTYPE AS indexType, ISINDEX AS isIndex,NEEDVALUE AS needValue,ISCONTORL AS isContorl,COLUMNNAME AS columnName,MEMO AS memo,TABLEINDEX AS tableIndex, ISQUERY AS isQuery,COLUMNNAME_STATE AS columnNameState,MD5_INDEX AS md5Index,ISPRIVATE AS isPrivate, STANDARD_RECNO AS standardRecno,PK_RECNO AS pkRecno,PARTITION_RECNO AS partitionRecno,CLUST_RECNO AS clustRecno, ORA_SHOW AS oraShow,NEEDVALUE AS needvalues, ODPS_PATTITION AS odpsPattition,PRO_TYPE AS proType,FIELDSOURCETYPE AS FieldSourceType, CREATETIME AS createTime,UPDATETIME AS updateTime,CREATOR AS creator,UPDATER AS updater,version_0 AS version_0, VERSION AS version from synlte.objectfield_history where objectId = #{objectId}

select s.FIELDID as fieldId,COLUMNNAME as columnName, FIELDNAME as fieldName, FIELDCHINESENAME as fieldChineseName, FIELDDESCRIBE as fieldDescribe, FIELDTYPE as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen, DEFAULTVALUE as defaultValue, MEMO as memo,s.CODEID as codeId, SAMEID as sameId, IS530NEW as is530New,VERSIONS as versions, Releasedate as releaseDate, FULL_CHINSEE as fullChinese,SIM_CHINESE as simChinese,SYNONY_NAME as synonyName, OBJECT_TYPE as objectType , EXPRESSION_WORD as expressionWord, CODEID_DETAIL as codeIdDetal,ISNORMAL as isNorMal,RELATE as relate,UNIT as unit, FUSE_TYPE as fuseType, FUSE_FIELDID as fuseFieldId,STATUS as statusNum, SUB_ORG as subOrg, SUB_AUTHOR as subAuthor,ON_DATE as onDate, REG_ORG as regOrg,FIELD_CLASS as fieldClass,SECRET_CLASS as secretClass,FIELD_STANDARD as fieldStandard, FACTURER as facturer, s.context as context,s.constraint as constraint, CREATETIME as createTime, UPDATETIME as updateTime,CREATOR as creator,UPDATER as updater from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD_history s where updateTime = #{updateTime} and fieldId = #{fieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select determinerId,dChinseName,dName,memo,author,modDate,determinerState as determinerStateNum, determinerType as determinerTypeNum,versions,releaseDate, facturer, REG_ORG as regOrg,on_Date as onDate from synlte.FieldDeterminer_history where modDate =#{updateTime} and determinerId =#{determinerId}

select distinct versions as text,versions as value from
synlte.objecte_version
synlte.synltefield_version
synlte.fielddeterminer_version

select distinct author as text,author as value from
synlte.objecte_version
synlte.synltefield_version
synlte.fielddeterminer_version
